MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-26-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PETITIONER 66 CLEARY COURT CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION'S PETITION TO APPROVE THE FIRST AMENDED AND RESTATED DECLARATION OF COVENANTS, CONDITIONS AND RESTRICTIONS IS GRANTED AND COMPLIES WITH CIVIL CODE 4275(C). RESPONDENT FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT PETITIONER ENGAGED IN ADVOCACY IN CONTRAVENTION OF CIVIL CODE SEC. 5105. THE AMENDMENT TO THE PET POLICY WAS NOT SUBSTANTIVE BECAUSE THE ORIGINAL PET POLICY WAS STILL SUBJECT TO THE BOARD'S PET RULES. THE AMENDMENT REGARDING RENTALS WAS REASONABLE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Mar-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER 66 CLEARY COURT CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION's Petition To Approve the First Amended and Restated Declaration of Covenants, Conditions and Restrictions is granted and complies with Civil Code 4275(c). Respondent fails to demonstrate that petitioner engaged in advocacy in contravention of Civil Code sec. 5105. The amendment to the pet policy was not substantive because the original pet policy was still subject to the Board's pet rules. The amendment regarding rentals was reasonable. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Continued To Mar-12-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER 66 CLEARY COURT CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION's Hearing On Petition to approve Petitioner's First Amended And Restated Declaration of Covenants, Conditions and Restrictions is continued on the Court's own motion to March 12, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
